outlook.volatilityExpectation: Moderate volatility expected. Positive total GEX (0.64B) suppresses moves, but negative monthly GEX (-0.14B) and bearish skew add downside tail risk if support breaks.
outlook.summary: Spot at 23923.5 caught between structural support (23200-23400) and resistance (24300-24400). Divergent signals: extreme bearish OI positioning (PCR 2.36) vs bullish intraday flow (Vol PCR 0.67). Max Pain at 23880 acts as primary price magnet. Dealers long gamma suggests contained moves with 24000 zone as pinning area.

levels.motivazione: Dominant PUT OI (563) in 0DTE with high Volume/OI ratio (1.88). Strongest structural support below spot. Unusual activity indicates active hedging.
CONFLUENCE: WEEKLY CALL 471 OI + MONTHLY CALL 412 OI. Strong resistance ceiling with multi-expiry validation. Monthly Max Pain alignment.
0DTE Max Pain within 0.2% of spot. Primary dealer target. High probability mean reversion magnet for session close.
CONFLUENCE: 0DTE PUT 359 OI + WEEKLY CALL 531 OI. Mixed positioning creates complex supply zone with hedging friction.
MONTHLY dominant PUT OI (597) near spot creates pinning risk. Heavy hedging zone with CALL OI (163) adding friction. Bearish smirk skew validates.
WEEKLY PUT OI (478) aligned with WEEKLY Max Pain. Dual confluence creates reinforced support at psychological level.
0DTE gamma neutral pivot. Critical regime shift level where dealer hedging changes direction. Break triggers vol expansion.
